title: salix × vistulensis
intro: Salix × vistulensis, also known as the Vistula willow, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Salix genus, combining characteristics of the white willow (Salix alba) and the Vistula willow (Salix × sepulcralis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the salicylic acid content in its bark, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Salix × vistulensis include pain relief, reduction of fever, and alleviation of symptoms associated with conditions such as rheumatism and arthritis. Salix × vistulensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
